prompt: VPC summary cho SaaS HR-Onboard (B2B 50-500 employee VN). Pain: onboarding manual 5-10 days, turnover 25-35% in 90 days, compliance errors. Gain: <1 day onboarding, <10% turnover, zero penalty. Enterprise annual 200-500M VND.

assertions.text: All 3 output files exist: offer.md, offer.json, conversion-copy.md
Skill recognizes B2B SaaS context — language is decision-maker oriented (HR Director, ROI, business case), not consumer-style

Bonuses are B2B-appropriate: implementation service, integration setup, dedicated CSM, executive briefing, training workshop, integration with HRIS/payroll. NOT consumer bonuses like '50 email templates' or 'Quick Win 7-day plan'
Guarantee suited for B2B: SLA-based, success-based (vd 'reduce turnover <10% in 6 months or free renewal'), dedicated CSM commitment. NOT 60-day money back.
Pricing in enterprise range: STANDARD around 200-350M VND/năm, PREMIUM 400-500M VND/năm. USD parallel quoting acceptable.
Urgency mechanism suited for B2B: founding customer pricing lock, cohort intake (Q2 onboarding), capacity limit (CSM team size). NOT 48h flash deal.
Conversion copy includes ROI framing — quantifies value (vd 'save 50 days HR/year' or 'reduce turnover cost 500M+/year') so decision-maker can justify
Value Equation scoring + bonus stack explicitly addresses 3 pains (manual onboarding time, 90-day turnover, compliance penalty)
Stack value / STANDARD price ratio between 8x and 15x. With enterprise context, stack values can include 'avoided turnover cost', 'avoided penalty', 'time saved × HR salary'
Vietnamese with anh/chị throughout. B2B terminology in Vietnamese (anh Giám đốc Nhân sự, đội ngũ, doanh nghiệp) — not English business jargon dumped in
offer.json is valid JSON with required keys including all enterprise-specific fields
